title: Complete User Profile (mobile + API)
description: Finish the User Profile feature: PATCH /profile with validation, avatar/name/phone fields in Prisma if missing, mobile profile screen wired to API with edit flow and error states. Do NOT rebuild auth or booking.
expected_output: Working profile screen and API integration with tests or manual verification steps in a short note.

title: Reviews & Ratings — full backend CRUD
description: Complete reviews module in apps/api: POST/GET reviews per business, aggregate rating stats, moderation flags, Prisma Review model migrations if incomplete. Replace any stub/TODO in reviews module.
expected_output: Working review endpoints with validation and role guards.

title: Reviews & Ratings — mobile submit & display
description: Wire SalonReviews and business detail reviews tab to real API: list reviews, submit review after appointment, star rating input, empty states.
expected_output: Users can view and submit reviews on mobile.

title: Payment Integration — Stripe backend
description: Implement real Stripe integration in apps/api: PaymentIntent or Checkout Session, webhook handler, PaymentProvider/PaymentStatus persistence, link to appointments. Replace stub payment module under apps/api/src/payment or backend/src/payment.
expected_output: Stripe checkout + webhook flow with env vars documented in .env.example.

title: Payment Integration — mobile checkout step
description: Add payment step to booking flow (or post-booking pay): integrate with payment API, handle success/failure, show receipt state. Use existing shared PaymentStatus types.
expected_output: End-to-end paid booking or pay-after-book path on mobile.

title: Notifications — email/push delivery
description: Implement notification delivery: queue-friendly service (email via Resend/SMTP or push stub), templates for booking confirmation/reminder, wire NotificationChannel enum. Extend notifications module beyond empty service.
expected_output: At least booking confirmation email path works end-to-end.

title: Provider / Business Owner Portal — API
description: Build provider APIs: manage business profile, services, staff, availability rules, view bookings for owned businesses. Enforce provider role guards. Flesh out provider-portal module (not empty Nest module).
expected_output: Provider can CRUD services/staff and see their appointments via API.

title: Provider / Business Owner Portal — mobile screens
description: Add provider-facing screens (or section): dashboard summary, today's appointments, quick service edit. Route gated by provider role.
expected_output: Provider role users have a usable owner workspace on mobile.

title: Admin Dashboard — Next.js app scaffold
description: Create apps/admin (Next.js App Router): login via Clerk admin role, list businesses/users, basic moderation queue for reviews. Minimal but real pages — not a single empty module file.
expected_output: Admin app runs locally with at least dashboard + businesses list.

title: Background Jobs (BullMQ)
description: Wire BullMQ workers in apps/api: jobs for notification send, availability cache refresh, optional scan simulation. Redis connection reuse. Replace background-jobs stub module.
expected_output: At least one worker processes a queued job successfully.

title: DevOps — Stripe webhooks & env for payments
description: Document and configure Stripe webhook route in deployment, add GitHub Action step or docker env for STRIPE_* secrets, update .env.example for payment vars.
expected_output: Webhook URL and env documented; CI/docker updated.

title: Code review — remaining features only
description: Review payment, provider portal, reviews, notifications, admin, and BullMQ changes for security (webhooks, auth guards), error handling, and consistency with architecture doc.
expected_output: Review report with blockers and fixes for remaining features.

title: Progress report — remaining scope
description: Compare codebase against product spec focusing ONLY on partial/missing features: Payment, Provider Portal, Reviews, Notifications, Admin, BullMQ, User Profile.
expected_output: Updated completion % and list of what is still open.
